dailyPageCrawls.description: Effective daily page-crawl cap from resolved feature flags.

dailySiteCrawls.description: Effective daily site-crawl cap from resolved feature flags.

maxSites.description: Effective max-sites limit used for enforcement/UI (resolved from account + plan defaults).

previewRequests.description: Effective preview-request cap (null when unlimited/not configured).

translationChars.description: Effective fresh-MT input character cap for the active plan.

charsTranslated.description: Total fresh-MT input characters charged during `[periodStart, periodEnd]`.

periodEnd.description: Inclusive end date for the usage counter period (`YYYY-MM-DD`).

periodStart.description: Inclusive start date for the usage counter period (`YYYY-MM-DD`).

deploymentId.description: Deployment id associated with this publish job. Queued jobs use the deterministic intended deployment id; unavailable jobs use the manifest source deployment id or "(active)" when no source manifest is available.

subjectAccountId.description: Optional: agencies can request a token scoped to a customer account they manage. When omitted, the token is minted for the authenticated Supabase user (self).

dryRun.description: Defaults to true. Set false to apply rewrites and enqueue renders.

maxDepth.description: Default: 0 (unlimited). Use positive integers to cap traversal depth from the source page.

date.description: UTC date (`YYYY-MM-DD`) for single-day crawl counters.

includeAgencyCustomers.description: Optional: include agency customer list when actor is an agency account.

subjectAccountId.description: Optional: agencies can request a bootstrap scoped to a customer account they manage. When omitted, the bootstrap is scoped to the authenticated Supabase user (self).

activeDeploymentId.description: Active serving deployment id from the KV pointer / artifact manifest namespace.

activeDeploymentRowId.description: Durable deployment row id matching the active serving deployment id, when present.

activeDeploymentStatus.description: Durable deployment row status matching the active serving deployment id, when present.

deploymentId.description: Latest deployment row id from the durable deployments table.

manifestDeploymentId.description: Manifest deployment id stored inside the latest deployment row's artifact manifest.

status.description: Latest deployment row status from the durable deployments table.

sourcePattern.description: Source path pattern. Use a final `/*` segment for subtree templates.

targetLang.description: Target locale language tag this template applies to.

targetPattern.description: Localized target path pattern. Must use `/*` when sourcePattern uses `/*`.

example.comment: Navigation spacing is slightly off in the header.

examples.comment: Navigation spacing is slightly off in the header.

statusToken.description: Per-preview status token required for status polling + SSE. Only returned on create.

maxDepth.description: Default: 0 (unlimited). Positive integers cap traversal depth from the source page.

runtimeRequestPolicyFingerprint.description: Derived fingerprint of normalized runtime request policy for optimistic saves.

runtimeRequestPolicyVersion.description: Route-config-derived runtime policy version served by customer route caches.

sourceSelectionFingerprint.description: Derived fingerprint of normalized flat source-selection rules for optimistic saves.

updatedAt.description: Route-config row update timestamp. Use as an optimistic concurrency token for settings edits.

allow.description: Header names explicitly allowed by this rule. Defaults to an empty allowlist.

pattern.description: Root-relative exact path or final-wildcard pattern, for example `/api/search` or `/flags/*`.

SiteSummary.description: Summary shape returned by `GET /api/sites`. Excludes detail/sensitive fields such as `locales`, `domains`, `routeConfig`, `webhookUrl`, `webhookSecret`, and `latestCrawlRun`.

domainCount.description: Total number of domains configured for this site.

localeCount.description: Total number of locales configured for this site.

serveEnabledLocaleCount.description: Number of configured locales where serving is currently enabled.

sourceLang.description: Primary source locale for the site summary. Derived from the first configured locale record; null when no locales exist.

verifiedDomainCount.description: Number of configured domains currently in verified status.

rules.description: Authoritative manual source-selection rules. With no include rules, unmatched paths are included. With one or more include rules, unmatched paths are excluded.

basis.description: This is an enqueue/rerun signal, not a per-deployment disappearance estimate.

required.description: True when the site is active and the draft flat source-selection rules differ.

scope.description: Impact counts are computed against known persisted page inventory only.

includeUnknownFutureDescendants.description: Dashboard hint only. Folder rules such as `/blog/*` already apply to future descendants through the persisted rules contract.

sourceSelection.description: Proposed flat backend source-selection rules to preview. This does not persist.

activeSiteRerun.message: Saving these rules on an active site will enqueue the existing site refresh flow.

warnings.message: Unmatched paths will be excluded because at least one include rule is present.

activeSiteRerun.message: Saving these rules on an active site will enqueue the existing site refresh flow.

warnings.message: Unmatched paths will be excluded because at least one include rule is present.

action.description: Rule action. Exclude and canonical_source prevent the matched page from being translated directly.

canonicalSourcePattern.description: Canonical source path pattern. Required for canonical_source rules; must mirror wildcard usage.

pattern.description: Source path pattern. Use a final `/*` segment for subtree rules.

complete.description: False when the backend capped preview scanning to keep the read-only preview bounded.

knownPagesTotal.description: Known pages analyzed for this preview response. When `complete` is false, this is capped.

resultNodesTotal.description: Tree nodes produced from the analyzed result set. When `complete` is false, this is capped.

activeSiteRerun.message: Saving these rules on an active site will enqueue the existing site refresh flow.

warnings.message: Unmatched paths will be excluded because at least one include rule is present.

activeSiteRerun.message: Saving these rules on an active site will enqueue the existing site refresh flow.

warnings.message: Unmatched paths will be excluded because at least one include rule is present.

expectedRouteConfigUpdatedAt.description: Optional optimistic concurrency token for dashboard source-selection edits. When provided with sourceSelection, the update fails with 409 if the current route-config row changed.

expectedRuntimeRequestPolicyFingerprint.description: Optional optimistic concurrency token for dashboard runtime-request-policy edits. When provided with runtimeRequestPolicy, the update fails with 409 if current policy differs.

expectedSourceSelectionFingerprint.description: Optional optimistic concurrency token for dashboard source-selection edits. When provided with sourceSelection, the update fails with 409 if current flat sourceSelection.rules differ.

maxDepth.description: Default: 0 (unlimited). Use positive integers to cap traversal depth from the source page.

urlMode.description: Optional on PATCH. If omitted, the existing value is preserved. Allowed values: original or translated.

info.description: API surface exposed by the webhooks-worker. Base path is /api; all endpoints require Authorization: Bearer <JWT> signed with WEBHOOK_SECRET unless noted.

post.description: Enqueues an operator rerun for one admin-managed demo site without incrementing customer manual crawl usage counters. The default recrawl_retranslate mode refreshes source pages through the normal pipeline; republish_rebuild_assets reuses active/latest rendered artifacts and enqueues publish-only jobs to rebuild deployment asset snapshots without MT. Publish-only repairs may be narrowed with targetLangs and sourcePaths and report zero paragraph/page-context/slug provider requests in the response.

404.description: The requested site is not one of the current admin's managed demo sites.

post.description: Dry-runs proposed `sourceSelection.rules` against known site pages using the same backend parser and resolver as persistence. This endpoint returns normalized compiled rules, summary counts, paginated page decisions, and warnings; it does not persist config or enqueue crawl/translation/publish work.

post.description: Dry-runs proposed flat `sourceSelection.rules` and returns backend-resolved folder/page tree nodes for dashboard editing. The durable contract remains flat rules; this endpoint is read-only. `summary`, `warnings`, and `impact` describe the full known-page inventory, while `nodes` and `inventory.resultNodesTotal` describe only the requested child/search result set.

parameters.description: Folder source path whose immediate child tree nodes should be returned when `search` is omitted. Defaults to `/`.
parameters.name: parentPath

parameters.description: Case-insensitive source-path substring search. Search results include matching page/folder nodes and ancestor folder context. Does not change global summary counts.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Maximum number of tree nodes to return (1-200). Defaults to 100.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous tree-preview page, currently the last returned node id.
parameters.name: cursor
